title: Plandl horn
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Plandl horn''' was a [[Music/Legends|musical]] instrument commonly used to make a [[Bontormian klesplong/Legends|Bontormian klesplong]].

==Sources==
*<!-- 1998-10-05 -->''[[Star Wars: The Visual Dictionary]]''
